findings.evidence: 208 calls to process.exit(1) without distinguishing user error, validation error, or system error
findings.impact: Integration tests cannot deterministically differentiate error types from exit codes

findings.evidence: Only 3 distinct codes used (0, 1, 2); timeout (code 4) appears only in rare subprocess calls
findings.impact: Cannot distinguish validation errors from system errors

findings.evidence: 3 locations pass exitCode from subprocess without validation
findings.impact: Subprocesses may return arbitrary codes; no normalization

recommendations.title: Standardize exit code semantics
recommendations.action: Adopt EXIT_SUCCESS (0), EXIT_USER_ERROR (1), EXIT_SYSTEM_ERROR (2), EXIT_VALIDATION_ERROR (3), EXIT_TIMEOUT (4)
recommendations.locations: Refactor 208 error exits to specify exact error category

recommendations.title: Distinguish validation vs system errors
recommendations.action: Use code 3 for schema/constraint violations, code 2 for I/O/network/subprocess failures

recommendations.title: Normalize subprocess exit codes
recommendations.action: Wrap subprocess calls to map codes: 0→0, 1→2, else→2 (treat as system error unless explicitly handled)
recommendations.locations: execSync() calls in cmdPlanScheduleFromOverlay, audit recovery, metrics computation

affected_commands: Error handling in emit() / json() functions
nextSteps: Create src/lib/cli-exit-codes.ts with standardized constants and helpers
Refactor bin/roadmap.ts to use typed exit helpers (exitUserError, exitSystemError, etc)
Add validation to subprocess exit code handling
Add tests to verify exit codes for each error path
